home.title: Public identity resources for Neuroartan.
home.intro: Neuroartan Brand is the public identity resource for Neuroartan logos, visual foundations, digital usage, and public brand assets. This site provides a clear reference point for brand recognition, external discussion, and discoverable public identity material.

sections.title: Logo
sections.description: Primary logo references, symbol usage, identity marks, and logo presentation guidance.

sections.title: Fundamentals
sections.description: Core identity principles, brand purpose, public positioning, and visual foundation rules.

sections.title: Color & Typography
sections.description: Color system, typographic direction, contrast logic, and visual consistency rules.

sections.title: Digital
sections.description: Digital presentation guidance for websites, profiles, social platforms, and product surfaces.

sections.title: Public Assets
sections.description: Publicly available logo and identity assets for references, listings, and brand discovery.

presence.title: Brand presence
presence.description: Neuroartan is a cognitive systems company developing ICOS, a voice-trained cognitive operating system for memory, reflection, continuity, and structured intelligence. The brand identity supports a minimal, precise, and future-facing public presence for the company and its product ecosystem.
